dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4532 IS: Small Business Wildfire Smoke Recovery Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Ms. Cortez Masto introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Small Business and Entrepreneurship

form.official-title: To include smoke in the definition of disaster in the Small Business Act, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Small Business Wildfire Smoke Recovery Act.
Section 3(k)(2) of the Small Business Act (15 U.S.C. 632(k)(2)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subparagraph (B), by striking and at the end;
in subparagraph (C), by striking the period at the end and inserting ; and; and
by adding at the end the following:
